metal_status.dispatch_reason: unsupported dtype for vendor MSL kernel: mlx.core.int32
metal_status.codegen_blocker_reason: tilelang 0.1.9 metal codegen cannot emit float8_e4m3 dtype (3rdparty/tvm/src/target/source/codegen_metal.cc:271 raises 'Cannot convert type float8_e4m3 to Metal type'); the CUDA codegen supports FP8 but the Metal one does not. Additionally, tilelang 0.1.9 metal target does not support T.gemm (Unsupported target for gemm: metal); waiting on tile-ai/tilelang HEAD with Apple simdgroup PRs. See docs/tilelang_ports/sparse_mla_blockscaled.md.
